step_rationale: Anti-inflammatory cytokine that suppresses plaque inflammation; reduced levels associate with plaque instability and MI risk.
mechanism: Interleukin-10 is a protective anti-inflammatory cytokine that restrains atherosclerotic plaque inflammation and macrophage activation; its reduction by oxidized lipids and inflammatory signals is associated with plaque destabilization and MI.
